assessment: First object to pass the full dimming funnel (main-sequence, no IR excess, g/r-achromatic monotonic fade). BUT the fade is only ~5%% over 6.9 yr with NO dips -- amplitude near the systematic/slow-variable noise floor. Most likely a low-amplitude long-period variable or residual star-specific systematic, NOT a KIC 8462852 analogue (which is defined by deep aperiodic DIPS, absent here). Worth revisiting with a longer baseline or independent-survey photometry, but not a noteworthy megastructure candidate.
